strings.en: Use Elemento as your Metacloud control plane to broker third-party infrastructure and services under your own governance model.
strings.it: Usa Elemento come control plane Metacloud per intermediare infrastruttura e servizi di terze parti sotto il tuo modello di governance.
strings.fr: Utilisez Elemento comme plan de contrôle Metacloud pour intermédier infrastructure et services tiers sous votre modèle de gouvernance.

strings.en: Expand Your Cloud Portfolio Without Building Every Service | Elemento
strings.it: Espandi il portfolio Cloud senza costruire ogni servizio | Elemento
strings.fr: Élargissez votre portefeuille Cloud sans tout construire | Elemento
